title: Pack of 6 Children Mini Smiley Maracas Toy
features: PARTY PACK: Set of 12 colourful mini maracas featuring cheerful smiley face designs in vibrant orange, yellow, green, pink, and blue colours
DESIGN: Each maraca features an easy-grip handle and durable plastic construction perfect for little hands to shake and play
MUSICAL DEVELOPMENT: Encourages rhythmic awareness and musical expression while providing a fun introduction to percussion instruments
DIMENSIONS: Compact size ideal for children's parties and classroom activities, perfectly sized for young musicians
ENTERTAINMENT VALUE: Perfect as party favours, carnival prizes, or musical toys for group activities and celebrations
description: Product description Add a burst of colour and rhythm to any party or playtime with these delightful mini smiley maracas! This cheerful set includes 12 vibrant pieces featuring adorable smiley face designs in bright, eye-catching colours like orange, yellow, green, pink, and blue. Each maraca is perfectly sized for little hands, making them ideal party favours, classroom music activities, or fun additions to children's musical instrument collections. The maracas produce a gentle, pleasant rattling sound that encourages rhythmic play and musical exploration. Their lightweight design and durable construction ensure hours of entertainment while helping develop motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Perfect for birthday parties, school events, music education, or simply adding some musical fun to everyday play. These playful percussion instruments are sure to bring smiles and joyful noise to any gathering. Safety Warning no safety required
